2250400.name: MicroCrawl
2250400.description:
Microcrawl is a bite sized point and click 2D adventure text hybrid presented from the first person in which you'll have to navigate your way through a dark fantasy anthology set in the same dark fantasy world.

A Retro Dark Fantasy Adventure

A love letter to retro adventure games packed into a compact experience. No pixel hunting and no moon logic.

A handcrafted Surreal Dream World Drawn Pixel By Pixel

Capturing the feeling of the Commodore 64, in an accessible package

Explore a narrative driven tale of broken characters.

As you try to find your way home learn the story of the others who became trapped before you.

Explore Three Separate Adventures And Discover The Lore Of The World Around You

We're proud to be able to have finished two entire new campaigns that are included for free. In 'Dead City' you will have to put the catacombs to rest by solving more difficult puzzles than are in the main adventure. In 'The Prison' discover the lore of the world around you while you try to escape.
2250400.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
